node.text:
Can you feel it in the Air? Zero gravity running is now here.

More pairs of the all-new Nike Vomero Premium are available October 16th. It’s time to Run Beyond.

Do you have what it takes to Run Beyond?

A zero gravity sensation in running is finally here. Be the first to go further in the limited edition Nike Vomero Premium “Proto” - available October 2nd.

node.text: Left on read? Nah. Never. @connermantz kept the receipts.

It’s not just the shoes — you can see him coming from a mile away. Half-Marathon American Record Holder @connermantz is clocking back in to chase the marathon record in Chicago.

Go behind the scenes of Conner’s testing journey with the Vomero Premium as he gears up for race day on @Nike YouTube. Link in bio.

“To create something that’s never been done before, you have to be willing to take risks.”

For any runner, risking it all for an American marathon record would be crazy. For @connermantz, it’s just another day at the office. Go inside Conner’s testing journey with the Vomero Premium before he goes full send in Chicago.

Watch the full video on @Nike YouTube. Link in bio.

Gravity never stood a chance.

Go behind the design of the all-new Nike Vomero Premium. Our most advanced max cushioning system delivers a zero gravity sensation you need to feel to believe.

Arriving in October. Tap the link in bio to get notified.

node.text: You hear that coming? It’s not just any runner – it’s @janehedengren coming for even more.

To be like @janehedengren, there’s only one rule: Bring your best. 

For an inside look into what it takes to run like Jane, watch the full video on Nike’s YouTube. Link in bio.

node.text:
“A consistent runner is a scary runner.”

Don’t be afraid of making history — @janehedengren isn’t. And that’s a terrifying sight for the competition. 

Catch up on Jane’s legendary career (it’s just getting started) with the full video on Nike’s YouTube. Link in bio.

Left everything out there. Except for gold.

Thanks for the titles, Tokyo.

AREA 72: Where athlete intelligence meets elite engineering.

Race week performance optimization, coming to a city near you. First stop: Berlin.
